zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle於1288年1月20日出生在英國貝德福爾坎普頓時，他的父親Sir Warin de L'Isle19歲，母親Alice de Montfort26歲。他和Margaret de Beauchamp至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1344年1月4日在英國越可爾希亞活 卡素享年55歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle于1288年1月20日出生在英国貝德福爾坎普頓时，他的父亲Sir Warin de L'Isle19岁，母亲Alice de Montfort26岁。他和Margaret de Beauchamp至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1344年1月4日在英国越可爾希亞活 卡素享年55岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle was born on 20 January 1288, in Campton, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir Warin de L'Isle, was 19 and his mother, Alice de Montfort, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret de Beauchamp. He died on 4 January 1344, in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle est né le 20 janvier 1288, à Campton, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Warin de L'Isle, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice de Montfort, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret de Beauchamp. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1344, à Harewood Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle am 20. Januar 1288 in Campton, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Warin de L'Isle 19 und seine Mutter Alice de Montfort 26. Er hatte mit Margaret de Beauchamp mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1344 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle è nato il il 20 gennaio 1288 nel Campton, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Warin de L'Isle, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Montfort, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret de Beauchamp. Morì il 4 gennaio 1344, nel Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisleが1288年1月20日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアカンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir Warin de L'Isleは19歳，母Alice de Montfortは26歳であった。彼はMargaret de Beauchampとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1344年1月4日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド カストルで55歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle(이)가 1288년 1월 20일 영국 베드퍼드실르 캠프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Warin de L'Isle(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Montfort(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret de Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1344년 1월 4일 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 카스틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.20 January 1288–4 January 1344: 20 de janeiro de 1288–4 de janeiro de 1344
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle nasceu em 20 de janeiro de 1288, em Campton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Warin de L'Isle, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Montfort, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret de Beauchamp. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1344, em Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle родился 20 января 1288 г. в местности камптон, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Warin de L'Isle было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Montfort, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret de Beauchamp. Он умер 4 января 1344 г. в местности харюуд кастл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.20 January 1288–4 January 1344: 20 de enero de 1288–4 de enero de 1344
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Lisle of Biggleswade, 1st Baron de Lisle nació el 20 de enero de 1288, en Campton, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Warin de L'Isle, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice de Montfort, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret de Beauchamp. Murió el 4 de enero de 1344, en Harewood Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
